text: Always pull link/point colors from var(--cp-*) via cssVarToRgba; never hardcode hex or float triplets in cosmos.gl config or applyDirective.

sources: CosmosGraphCanvas.tsx:194-202 caught with hardcoded triplets in initial migration

text: Use setConfigPartial for every cosmos.gl runtime update; reserve setConfig for the initial new Graph(...) construction only.
Always extract Float32Array allocations to a power-of-two bucket pool outside per-frame and per-data-update hot paths.

sources: CosmosGraphCanvas.tsx pushDataToGraph allocates four arrays per data identity change

text: Always pair new Graph(...) with graph.destroy() in the same effect's cleanup; React StrictMode double-mount will leak the GPU resources otherwise.
Share exactly one Mosaic Coordinator per page; bind via context (CosmosMosaicProvider) and never call coordinator() twice in a single page tree.
Hoist Mosaic Selection.crossfilter()/intersect()/union() calls to module scope or stable refs; never construct a Selection inside a render function.
Route every Theseus SceneDirective through applyDirective; UI components must never call cosmos.gl setters (setPointPositions, setLinks, setConfigPartial) directly.
When a SceneDirective field exists in refs/theseus-viz-types/SceneDirective.ts but applyDirective has no handler, the adapter is failing silently; add the handler before declaring work complete.

sources: actual adapter.ts handles only salience+camera (2 of 7 jobs) against the v3 SceneDirective contract

text: Render points missing layer_positions[active_position_layer] data in pending visual (cluster center, desaturated, 0.6x size, hollow shape); never drop them silently.
Cap simultaneous cosmos.gl labels at 5000; render labels for the top-K visible by zoom level and importance, recompute on zoom and on filter change (not per frame).

sources: if-conflict rule: performance constraint wins over visual

text: Import only from @cosmos.gl/graph; never from @cosmograph/react or @cosmograph/cosmograph (the branded wrapper bundles proprietary glue and is not the contract).

sources: migration commit 9f06291 already swapped Cosmograph for cosmos.gl

text: Use vgplot only for standard Mosaic-bound charts (rectY, areaY, lineX, dot, intervalX/Y); for custom layouts write a MosaicClient subclass and use D3 (route to d3-pro), do not bend vgplot internals.
